specClauses: ENGINEERING_SPEC.md § Manifest trust root: a structurally valid custom untrusted manifest forces policy-dependent verifications to unknown; observed neutral facts may remain available; it cannot replace the default live report.
THREAT_MODEL.md § Result semantics: untrusted policy forces policy-dependent verification to unknown.
THREAT_MODEL.md § Required adversarial tests, item 30: a structurally valid but unapproved manifest with fabricated reviewer metadata attempting to replace the default live policy.
